diagnostics_hook:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(head -c 65536); FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
[[ "$FILE" != *.tf && "$FILE" != *.tfvars ]] && { echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; exit 0; }
DIR=$(dirname "$FILE")
ERRORS=$(cd "$DIR" && terraform validate -no-color 2>&1 | head -15)
echo "$ERRORS" | grep -qiE 'error' && echo "$ERRORS" >&2
echo '{"decision":"approve"}'
notes: terraform validate requires terraform init first. terraform fmt fixes formatting. tflint catches more issues.
